title: Origins: Elemental Lives
description: Element-themed Origins for the Origins mod. Simple elemental Origins.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qVMdBMjBDLU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**This data pack is designed for the Origins mod.**

### **Fire Life:**

**🟩 Flamethrower [​Primary]:** Shoot out a flame that will light targets on fire.

**🟢 One with the Flames:** Immunity to fire.

**🟢 Flame Transmission:** Targets catch on fire when hit.

**🔴 Hydrophobia:** You will be extinguished upon contact with water.

### **Plant Life:**

**🟩 Poison Ivy Vines [​Primary]:** Send out a vine that applies poison to the target.

**🟩 Plant Caretaker:** Shift right click plants with an empty hand to make them grow.

**🟢 Regrowth:** Heal when in water.

**🔴 Flammable:** Take extra damage from fire and lava.

**🔴 Light Deprivation:** Weakness when in low light levels.

### **Thunder Life:**

**🟩 Electrical Discharge [​Primary]:** Shoot out a lightning bolt dealing 4 hearts of damage.

**🟢 Increased Conductivity:** When the player is wearing full iron armor they will get resistance and the primary ability deals 7 damage.

**🟢 Imbued with Energy:** Increased speed.

**🔴 Grounded:** When below y30 you lose your increased speed and cannot use your primary.

**🔴 Electrical Field:** Netherite seems to conflict with your electrical field and therefore cannot be worn.

### **Water Life:**

**🟩 Tsunami [​Primary]:** Send a tsunami out to push targets away and deal 5 hearts of damage.

**🟢 Current Control:** By controlling the current of the water, you boost your swimming speed and mining speed.

**🔴 Drying Out:** Decreased walk speed when on land.

**🔴 Dried Out:** Heavily decreased walk speed when in the Nether.

### **Ice Life:**

**🟩 Winter Storm [​Primary]:** Summon a blizzard with a 10 block radius centered on the target. Blizzard will drain health from those inside of it.

**🟢 Frigid Territory:** Boosted damage when in cold environments.

**🟢 Icy Propulsion:** Boosted speed when in water.

**🔴 Evaporation:** Take extra damage from fire and lava.

**🔴 Melted:** When in the Nether, your walk speed will be heavily reduced and you can no longer use your ability.

### **Sun Life:**

**🟩 Praise the Sun [​Primary]:** Heal and gain resistance as well as regeneration for 10 seconds.

**🟢 Blissful Light:** Boosted speed during the day.

**🔴 Bouncing Sunlight:** Glow during the day.

**🔴 Gloomy Moon:** Abilities only work during the day.

**🔴 Tiring Moon:** Decreased speed at night.

### **Moon Life:**

**🟩 Crescent Worship [​Primary]:** Heal and get boosted attack speed for 30 seconds.

**🟢 Bloodthirsty Moon:** Boosted attack at night.

**🔴 Bouncing Moonlight:** Glow during the night.

**🔴 Blinding Sun:** Abilities only work during the night.

**🔴 Conquering Sun:** Decreased speed during the day.

[If you have any questions, concerns, or bugs you would like to report, my Discord server is a great place for doing so.](https://discord.gg/b8jJUQ29Wg)
